title: Sphaerostephanos subulifolius
taxonomy: Sphaerostephanos subulifolius is a species of fern in the family Dryniaceae. It belongs to the genus Sphaerostephanos, which is a group of ferns that are commonly found in tropical regions. The family Dryniaceae is a part of the larger division of ferns known as Polypodiopsida. This species is classified within the kingdom Plantae and further categorized into the phylum Pteridophyta.
